changes.description: Replaced coming-soon stub with a card-grid hub linking to team, agents, erp, integrations, domains, license, and wizard sub-settings
Replaced coming-soon stub with a workflow management page that fetches GET /api/proxy/workflow/templates and shows status badge, trigger type icon, and enable/disable toggle per template
Replaced hardcoded usersUsed=2 with an API call to /settings/team/count fetched in parallel with the existing license status call
